title: rubus furnarius
intro: Rubus furnarius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus furnarius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues. Rubus furnarius can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
